Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

full_latest_gov_baton.final_compiler_rationale: Source boundary cannot close. The export license LIC-SIE-073 authorizes Peru only, while shipment SHIP-SIE-073 targets Chile. Policy STD-SIE-073-P mandates exact destination match. No worker iteration can resolve source record misalignment. Release must remain blocked until source documents are corrected and re-verified. The warning WARN-SIE-073 correctly flagged this precision requirement. All other fields (ECCN, end-user, dates) match exactly, confirming the only defect is destination scope.
full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton.

required_repairs: Source record repair required: either LIC-SIE-073 amended to authorize Chile, or SHIP-SIE-073 corrected to Peru—workers cannot repair source records
Human review required to determine whether shipment destination should change to Peru or license should be expanded to Chile

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Both workers (xai/grok-3-mini, google/gemini-2.5-flash-lite) correctly identified destination mismatch as the sole open blocker. Worker 2 artifact passed deterministic gate with critical_feature_count=3. Source-boundary cannot close due to destination scope misalignment (SHIP-SIE-073 Chile vs LIC-SIE-073 Peru). Workers cannot repair source records—only compile final fail-closed disposition.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 exports ECCN 3A991 sensor array to Chile for end user Andes Labs on 2026-06-28.
Dual-use warning WARN-SIE-073 says similar sensor arrays require exact license evidence and should not rely on product family alone.
Export license LIC-SIE-073 covers ECCN 3A991 sensor array, destination Peru, end user Andes Labs, shipment date 2026-06-28, effective before export.

policy_documents.content: Controlled export is complete only when export license evidence matches ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, and license effective date before export.
